title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at SFC Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
